meta.title: Snowboard Equipment Recommender - Board Selection by Height, Weight & Experience
meta.description: Get personalized snowboard, boot, and binding recommendations based on your height, weight, and experience. Free snowboard size calculator and equipment selection guide.
meta.keywords: snowboard size calculator, snowboard selection, snowboard recommendation, snowboard calculator, snowboard size chart, snowboard binding selection, snowboard boot selection

calculator.trustText: This tool provides general recommendations. For the most accurate selection, we recommend trying equipment at a professional store.

experienceDescriptions.advanced: Comfortable on all runs, has park experience
experienceDescriptions.expert: Can ride in any conditions, can do tricks

about.title: Who We Are
about.subtitle: We're a team of passionate snowboarders dedicated to helping you find the perfect equipment.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We believe that every snowboarder deserves access to expert-level equipment recommendations. Our mission is to democratize snowboard equipment selection by providing free, accurate, and personalized recommendations to riders of all levels.

team.title: Our Team
team.description: Our team consists of experienced snowboarders, data scientists, and software engineers who are passionate about making snowboarding more accessible.

accuracy.title: Accuracy
accuracy.description: We use scientific algorithms and real-world data to provide the most accurate recommendations.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: We're upfront about how we make money and never let it influence our recommendations.

community.title: Community
community.description: We're building a community of snowboarders who help each other find the perfect gear.

guides.title: Snowboard Guides & Tutorials
guides.description: Everything you need to know about snowboarding, from equipment selection to advanced techniques.
